meaning: adv.向右地,在右侧adj.在右边的,向右的
examples: The result reflects a modest rightward shift in opinion.
He continued to urge the Republican Party to tilt rightward.
These effects are represented by a rightward shift in supply to S2.
Yet he risks finding himself trapped by the relentlessly rightward path he has adopted.
The Belgians' rightward trend was matched next-door in tiny Luxembourg, which also had a general election.
